caption: The video appears to be a news broadcast from News18 India, focusing on a political event or press conference. The scene shows two individuals seated at a table with microphones and nameplates, suggesting they are addressing an audience or participating in a discussion. The person on the left is wearing a white outfit, while the individual on the right is dressed in a white shirt with a red scarf. A man in a suit stands behind them, possibly as security or support staff. The background includes floral arrangements, adding a formal touch to the setting. The text overlays indicate that the content is related to a political figure named Tejashwi and mention "Congress Chhota Pati," hinting at a political narrative or controversy. The breaking news banner at the bottom emphasizes the urgency and importance of the event being covered.
